steps.t: The canal can be found south of Noglond, flowing down from Thorin's Halls. Geitir asks you to investigate the flow of the canal to Noglond and learn t…
There are thickets blocking the canal between Noglond and Thorin's Halls. Now that you have discovered the problem in the canal, you should clear away…
Geitir is at Noglond to the north of the canal, south of Thorin's Halls. You should return to Geitir with news of your success.
